message:
refactor(hook): move blocking IO off async thread and update tests

Convert estimate_timing_for_build() from sync to async, using
tokio::task::spawn_blocking for the TimingHistory::load() disk read.
This prevents the async executor from blocking on filesystem IO during
hook processing, which is critical for responsiveness when many
concurrent build hooks fire simultaneously.

Similarly, move TimingHistory::save() in record_build_timing() to a
fire-and-forget spawn_blocking task since timing persistence is
best-effort and should never block the main hook response path.

Update all callers and tests:
- process_hook() now awaits estimate_timing_for_build()
- test_estimate_timing_returns_none_without_history becomes #[tokio::test]
- E2E hook tests updated for new async signatures

cache.rs: minor adjustment to cache path handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
